channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL scouting combine features plenty of debate over top players at multiple positions
item.description: The hopes of many NFL teams will start taking shape this week as the league’s annual scouting combine begins in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Auburn atop AP Top 25 for 7th straight week; preseason No. 1 KU out, ending ranked run at 80 weeks
item.description: Auburn remained atop the AP Top 25 for the seventh straight week Monday while preseason No. 1 Kansas fell out of the men’s basketball poll for the first time since February 2021.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wojnarowski auctions iPhones used for 'Woj bombs' to raise NIL money at St. Bonaventure
item.description: Adrian Wojnarowski is cleaning out his office of cell phones and press passes, and even offering dinner dates in a bid to raise name, image and likeness funds for the St. Bonaventure men’s basketball program.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cowboys eye quarterback in upcoming draft, team exec says
item.description: Dallas Cowboys executive Stephen Jones tipped his hand on what the goals were for the upcoming 2025 NFL Draft ahead of the scouting combnie.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees will play Sinatra's 'New York, New York' only after home wins, returning to original custom
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Yankees will play Frank Sinatra's version of the “Theme From New York, New York” only after home wins instead of all games in the Bronx, going back to the original custom set by owner George Steinbrenner in 1980.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaun White's new snowboard league to head to Aspen and mountain in China where he ended his career
item.description: After opening in Aspen, Colorado, next week, Shaun White's new halfpipe league will travel to the mountain in China where he closed out his career at the 2022 Beijing Olympics.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Logan Paul 'never doing' at least 1 high-risk move in WWE again
item.description: Logan Paul has become one of the top heels in WWE since he made his first appearance in 2021. His wrestling moves landed him credibility with the audience.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR driver Carson Hocevar draws ire from fellow racers amid 2nd-place finish at Atlanta
item.description: NASCAR driver Carson Hocevar drew backlash from his fellow racers on Sunday because of his over-aggressive driving during the Ambetter Health 400.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brooks and James help No. 13 NC State beat No. 1 Notre Dame 104-95 in double OT
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — Zoe Brooks scored a career-high 33 points to help No. 13 N.C. State beat top-ranked Notre Dame 104-95 in double overtime Sunday, ending the Fighting Irish's 19-game winning streak while keeping alive their hopes to share the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Match preview: San Diego FC set to make historic MLS debut against LA Galaxy
item.description: San Diego FC is set to take the field on Sunday for the first time in Major League Soccer, facing off against the reigning MLS Cup champions, LA Galaxy, at Dignity Health Sports Park -- a history making match.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL settles for scoreless draw in Champions Cup opener
item.description: SAN JOSE, Costa Rica (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake kicked off its 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a scoreless draw against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano in RSL's first Champions Cup game since 2016. "I thought it was a really hard fought game," said RSL head coach Pablo Mastroeni.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Mastroeni prepares Real Salt Lake for a physical battle in Costa Rica
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni anticipates a fierce contest as his team travels to Costa Rica for their first competitive match of 2025 — a CONCACAF Champions Cup Round One clash against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Researchers confirm Hall of Famer Bobby Hull had CTE when he died 2 years ago
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Bobby Hull, the Hall of Fame forward and two-time NHL MVP who helped the Chicago Blackhawks win the Stanley Cup in 1961, had chronic traumatic encephalopathy when he died two years ago, his widow said in a statement released on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
